summary: Successfully implemented non-usage stall monitoring with 3-signal detection, debounce thresholds, safe-boundary auto-pause, and manual-only resume. All 10 tests pass. Phase B usage features remain blocked.

signals: Signal A: No phase transition (track phase_transitions count)
Signal B: No state.runtime.json or checkpoint modification (track mtime)
Signal C: N ticks with same round/phase (track last_checked_round/phase)
implementation.auto_pause: At safe boundary only, sets pause_reason=auto_paused_by_stall, saves checkpoint
implementation.telegram_alert: Sent once per stall event (mock mode, no real API calls)
implementation.resume: NO auto-resume under any circumstance. Only manual /start can resume.

pause_state.py: Updated get_pause_info() to return checkpoint data
status_scheduler.py: Updated start_chain() to handle auto_paused_by_stall recovery

coverage: TestTelegramAlertOnce: alert sent once per stall

phase_b_status.reason: No OpenCode API quota/reset source available
